title: Learning Game Development as a Noob
description: I want to make video games and know how they work at a deeper level. Not generate code and assets with an AI, or let a modern game engine do all the work

title: Learning GO as a Noob
description: Moving from Java to Go has been relatively easy for me so far, but to really get into the nitty gritty, I need good tutorials and resources.

title: Image Optimization
description: If one can cache cheaply, then cache you should. But I found out the hard way that without good edge caching or simply that ONE time the user has to load your site for the first time and you don't have any optimization
